executionArgs.additionalInstruction: The app is a Next.js 16 real estate platform running on port 3000. The homepage has property cards, search filters, and a hero section. The search page at /search fetches from Firestore. The property detail page at /property/[id] has a contact form. Test the main user flows: homepage rendering, search navigation, property detail viewing, and favorites toggling. No login is needed for basic browsing tests.
